title: Container Report - Week 36
summary:
Main
The tariff saga continues with a US federal appeals court upholding a ruling that the imposed tariffs were implemented on an illegal basis. The Trump administration has until mid-October to appeal this to the Supreme Court, with any final ruling coming likely next year, so tariff uncertainty will certainly continue into next year. As we entered into September we have seen increases on container freight rates for Far East to US East Coast and US West Coast ports.
